mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO organ (
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_name, organ_type, status,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO organ (
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_name, organ_type, status,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE organ
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
organ_name = #{organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_type = #{organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE organ
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
organ_name = #{organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_type = #{organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE organ
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_name, organ_type, status, admin,
delete_flag,
version FROM organ WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.organ_name FROM organ o INNER JOIN organ_closure oc ON o.id = oc.descendant_id WHERE o.delete_flag = 0 AND oc.delete_flag = 0
AND oc.ancestor_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND oc.relation_type = 'SELF_ASSOCIATION'
AND o.organ_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
ORDER BY CHAR_LENGTH(o.organ_name) DESC
